message:
fix(polecat): isSessionProcessDead returns false on tmux query errors (gt-kncti)

Previously returned true (process dead) on any GetPanePID error, causing
ReconcilePoolWith to kill sessions on transient tmux failures like
permission denied. Now only returns true when we can confirm the process
is actually dead (empty PID, Signal(0) failure).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
